proposed_entries.title: ## Decision: persistent staging and production environments
proposed_entries.body: ## Decision: persistent staging and production environments

proposed_entries.title: We decided that MBSH should keep persistent staging and production Netlify environments
proposed_entries.body: We decided that MBSH should keep persistent staging and production Netlify environments. Staging deploys the `staging` branch to `mbsh-reunion-staging`; production deploys the `main` branch to the public production Netlify project and custom domain. Promotion should happen by branch flow and Netlify deploy history, not by deleting staging or changing DNS for frontend rollbacks.

proposed_entries.title: ## Decision: Site Studio owns service capability relationships
proposed_entries.body: ## Decision: Site Studio owns service capability relationships

proposed_entries.title: ## Learning: Netlify project names can mislead deploy reasoning
proposed_entries.body: ## Learning: Netlify project names can mislead deploy reasoning

proposed_entries.title: The production project was named `loquacious-valkyrie-37d5f8`, while the staging project was named `
proposed_entries.body: The production project was named `loquacious-valkyrie-37d5f8`, while the staging project was named `mbsh-reunion-staging`. The production project was already GitHub-linked to `famtastic-fritz/mbsh-reunion` on `main`; the staging project was initially unlinked and later connected to the same repo on `staging`. Deploy verification must key off site id, repo path, repo branch, and latest deploy commit, not project name alone.

proposed_entries.title: ## Vendor fact: cPanel addon domain repaired API DNS and vhost routing in this GoDaddy-hosted accoun
proposed_entries.body: ## Vendor fact: cPanel addon domain repaired API DNS and vhost routing in this GoDaddy-hosted account
proposed_entries.auto_promote_reason: confidence >= 0.85 AND type 'vendor-fact' is in allowlist

proposed_entries.title: `api
proposed_entries.body: `api.mbsh96reunion.com` initially did not resolve and forced backend smoke to fall back to `https://FAMTASTICINC.COM`. Creating the cPanel addon/vhost for `api.mbsh96reunion.com` mapped it to `/home/nineoo/public_html` and caused GoDaddy authoritative DNS to return `107.180.51.234`. The repair required both DNS and Apache vhost routing; an A record alone would have hit the wrong vhost.
proposed_entries.auto_promote_reason: confidence >= 0.85 AND type 'vendor-fact' is in allowlist

proposed_entries.title: ## Vendor fact: this cPanel account does not expose AutoSSL
proposed_entries.body: ## Vendor fact: this cPanel account does not expose AutoSSL
proposed_entries.auto_promote_reason: confidence >= 0.85 AND type 'vendor-fact' is in allowlist

proposed_entries.title: cPanel returned `You do not have the feature "autossl"` for AutoSSL checks
proposed_entries.body: cPanel returned `You do not have the feature "autossl"` for AutoSSL checks. The working path was Let's Encrypt HTTP-01 through temporary challenge files uploaded by cPanel Fileman, followed by cPanel `SSL/install_ssl` for `api.mbsh96reunion.com`.
proposed_entries.auto_promote_reason: confidence >= 0.85 AND type 'vendor-fact' is in allowlist

proposed_entries.title: ## Bug pattern: platform smoke runner failed only after canonical DNS succeeded
proposed_entries.body: ## Bug pattern: platform smoke runner failed only after canonical DNS succeeded
proposed_entries.auto_promote_reason: confidence >= 0.85 AND type 'bug-pattern' is in allowlist

proposed_entries.title: When smoke no longer fell back to `https://FAMTASTICINC
proposed_entries.body: When smoke no longer fell back to `https://FAMTASTICINC.COM`, `platform/capabilities/smoke/test-endpoints.sh` hit `CURL_SSL_ARGS[@]: unbound variable` on macOS Bash with `set -u`. The fix was to initialize the array with a harmless curl arg (`-q`) and override to `-k` only for the fallback host.
proposed_entries.auto_promote_reason: confidence >= 0.85 AND type 'bug-pattern' is in allowlist

proposed_entries.title: ## Gap: API certificate renewal is not automated
proposed_entries.body: ## Gap: API certificate renewal is not automated

proposed_entries.title: The manually issued Let's Encrypt certificate for `api
proposed_entries.body: The manually issued Let's Encrypt certificate for `api.mbsh96reunion.com` expires on `2026-08-03`. Site Studio needs a certificate-renewal capability for cPanel-backed APIs or a documented renewal runbook that can be executed before expiry.
proposed_entries.auto_promote_reason: confidence >= 0.85 AND type 'vendor-fact' is in allowlist

proposed_entries.title: ## Gap: deploy environments need structured project linkage
proposed_entries.body: ## Gap: deploy environments need structured project linkage

proposed_entries.title: The deploy strategy is now clear for MBSH, but Site Studio needs a reusable environment model with f
proposed_entries.body: The deploy strategy is now clear for MBSH, but Site Studio needs a reusable environment model with fields for local repo path, remote repo, local branch, staging Netlify project id, production Netlify project id, custom domain, API origin, latest deploy commit, and promotion state. This should become platform data rather than prose per site.
proposed_entries.auto_promote_reason: confidence >= 0.85 AND type 'vendor-fact' is in allowlist
